title: rubus vulgaris f. commutatus
intro: Rubus vulgaris f. commutatus, also known as the Black Raspberry or Black Dewberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris f. commutatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
